ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API response */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Numeric status code indicating the response status */,
  "organization_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the organization generated by the system */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Description of the response status */,
  "b2b_wallet_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the wallet created returned by P-Pay API */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the transaction generated by the API */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API request was made */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API response was received */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the API request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the request was made */,
  "api_version" TEXT /* Version of the API used for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_responses_status_code FOREIGN KEY ("status_code") REFERENCES status_codes ("status_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_responses_organization_code FOREIGN KEY ("organization_code") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Numeric status code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status code indicates */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the status code (e.g., success, error, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the organization was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the organization's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the wallet created by P-Pay API */,
  "organization_code" TEXT /* Reference to the organization that owns the wallet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the wallet was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wallet (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the wallet */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the wallet */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the wallet's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_organization_code FOREIGN KEY ("organization_code") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "wallet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the wallet used in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction request */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* User who processed the transaction */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was processed */,
  "source_wallet_id" TEXT /* ID of the source wallet in case of a transfer */,
  "destination_wallet_id" TEXT /* ID of the destination wallet in case of a transfer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who initiated the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is final (i.e., no further changes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API response where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the error */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the error */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the error resolution (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_errors_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES api_responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_errors_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
